name: FacilityRegistration
description: Industrial facility registration with CPCB OCEMS device identity and Consent to Operate details

fields.name: industryCategory
fields.title: Industry Category
fields.description: CPCB mandatory OCEMS industry category (tannery, dyes, distillery, dairy, sugar, pulp_paper, thermal_power, cement, oil_refinery, fertilizer, chlor_alkali, pesticides, pharma, iron_steel, copper_smelting, zinc_smelting, aluminium, petrochemicals)

fields.name: state
fields.title: State
fields.description: Indian state where facility is located

fields.name: ctoNumber
fields.title: CTO Number
fields.description: Consent to Operate permit number issued by SPCB

fields.name: ctoBODLimit
fields.title: CTO BOD Limit (mg/L)
fields.description: Custom BOD limit if stricter than Schedule-VI default (30 mg/L)

fields.name: ctoCODLimit
fields.title: CTO COD Limit (mg/L)
fields.description: Custom COD limit if stricter than Schedule-VI default (250 mg/L)

fields.name: ctoTSSLimit
fields.title: CTO TSS Limit (mg/L)
fields.description: Custom TSS limit if stricter than Schedule-VI default (100 mg/L)

fields.name: deviceKmsKeyId
fields.title: Device KMS Key ID
fields.description: AWS KMS key ARN for this device signing key

fields.name: deviceHederaAccountId
fields.title: Device Hedera Account
fields.description: Hedera account controlled by this device KMS key
